title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at HDFC Life Insurance

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at HDFC Life Insurance
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with HDFC Life Insurance! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About HDFC Life Insurance:
HDFC Life Insurance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Life Insurance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
